title: Inconsistent Commit Message Format
description: The commit message format in the feature request command does not consistently follow the specified guidelines.

root_cause_potential: Missing enforcement of commit message standards
Documentation inconsistencies in feature request process
Lack of standardization across development workflows
technical_analysis.suggested_solution: Ensure all commit messages adhere to the defined format

immediate_fixes.action: Update feature request command to follow consistent commit message format
immediate_fixes.rationale: Maintain consistency in project documentation and workflows

immediate_fixes.action: Review and standardize commit message guidelines
immediate_fixes.rationale: Ensure clarity and consistency across all project documentation

immediate_fixes.action: Add validation for commit message format compliance
immediate_fixes.rationale: Prevent future inconsistencies through automated checks

impact_assessment.functionality_impact: Low - Does not affect system functionality
impact_assessment.urgency: Low - Can be addressed in regular maintenance cycles
